attributes.description: Dashboard for audit logs from Microsoft Intune Audit

params.markdown:
**Microsoft Intune**

**Overview**

This dashboard provides a concise overview of Audit logs, helping monitor administrative and operational activities. It highlights total events, event trends over time, and most active actors.

The dashboard also shows actions by actor type, delegated admin events, non-delegated admin event, events by application, and a summary of modified properties (including Operation Name, Target Display Name, old and new values). An essential audit details view supports quick investigation by displaying key fields such as operation name, actor UPN, targets, result type, and correlation ID.

[**Integrations Page**](/app/integrations/detail/microsoft_intune/overview)

attributes.title: [Logs Microsoft Intune] Audit
